report_name: Hong Kong Regulator Sounds Alarm on AI-Powered Cyberattacks, Mandates Stronger Defenses

threat_actors.name: AI-enabled Cybercriminals
threat_actors.description: A class of malicious actors described by Hong Kong's SFC who leverage Artificial Intelligence to conduct more sophisticated and scalable attacks, such as phishing and vulnerability exploitation, against the financial sector.
threat_actors.goals: Financial theft, data breaches, and market manipulation.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: The SFC warns that AI is used to create highly convincing and personalized phishing emails and deepfake audio/video for social engineering attacks, making them harder to detect.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: The SFC warns that AI tools are used to accelerate the scanning for and development of exploits for vulnerabilities in public-facing applications.

attack_patterns.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
attack_patterns.description: The SFC warns that AI can be used to generate polymorphic malware or craft malicious scripts to evade signature-based detection.

attack_patterns.name: Impair Defenses
attack_patterns.description: The SFC warns that AI enables attackers to dynamically alter their tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs) in real-time to bypass security controls.

tools.name: Generative AI
tools.description: Leveraged by malicious actors to create highly convincing phishing campaigns, deepfake audio/video, and to automate vulnerability discovery and exploit development.

identities.name: Securities and Futures Commission (SFC)
identities.description: Hong Kong's financial regulator that issued guidance on June 2, 2026, warning the financial sector about the growing threat from AI-powered cyberattacks.

identities.name: Hong Kong Computer Emergency Response Team Coordination Centre
identities.description: Cited by the SFC, this organization reported a 27% increase in cyber incidents in Hong Kong during 2025.

identities.name: Internet Brokers
identities.description: A class of financial firms in Hong Kong directed by the SFC to enhance their security posture against AI-powered threats.

identities.name: Virtual Asset Trading Platforms
identities.description: A class of cryptocurrency exchanges and other virtual asset platforms in Hong Kong directed by the SFC to enhance their security posture against AI-powered threats.

relationships.source_name: Hong Kong Computer Emergency Response Team Coordination Centre
